settings.label: Design

settings.label: Privacy

settings.heading: Intimacy products for private confidence.
settings.text: Libersens is built around the idea that pleasure, care, and privacy can feel elegant and uncomplicated.
settings.panel_heading: A softer way to shop intimacy.
settings.panel_text: About pages for intimacy brands need to build trust quickly. This page introduces the brand, explains the design philosophy, and gives customers a reason to feel safe browsing further.
